ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the post */,
  "slug" TEXT /* A URL-friendly version of the post title */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the post content */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of a thumbnail image for the post */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Whether the post is featured */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Whether the post is sticky (pinned to the top) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "ratings_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the post has received */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, author, moderator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the user was active */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences for notifications (e.g., email, push notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "slug" TEXT /* A URL-friendly version of the category name */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon for the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment, if the comment is a reply */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is approved */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is deleted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the version belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Whether this version is a major update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_versions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "slug" TEXT /* A URL-friendly version of the tag name */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the tag */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Whether the tag is popular */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag relationship */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the post */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who viewed the post */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who viewed the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the post */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was rated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_ratings_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
